items.why_zh: 苹果战略转向AI眼镜标志着其XR路线的重大调整，可能重塑智能眼镜市场格局；黄仁勋的综艺首秀则反映了科技领袖向大众文化渗透的趋势。
items.why_en: Apple's shift to AI glasses marks a major strategic change in XR, potentially reshaping the smart glasses market; Huang's TV debut reflects tech leaders' penetration into pop culture.

items.title_zh: 埃隆·马斯克碾压华尔街，迈向万亿富翁之路
items.title_en: Elon Musk is steamrolling Wall Street to become a trillionaire
items.summary_zh: 随着SpaceX IPO临近，这将成为历史上规模最大的公开募股之一，估值近2万亿美元。然而，过程中许多维护市场公平的规则被扭曲甚至打破。本文通过采访《纽约时报》科技记者Ryan Mac（合著《Character Limit: How Elon Musk Destroyed Twitter》），探讨马斯克如何利用其影响力绕过传统金融规则，以及这对华尔街和监管机构的挑战。SpaceX的上市不仅规模空前，更可能重塑科技公司的上市模式。
items.summary_en: Today on Decoder , I’m talking to Ryan Mac, a technology reporter at The New York Times and coauthor of the excellent book Character Limit: How Elon Musk Destroyed Twitter , which came out in 2024 . I can’t recommend it enough. I wanted to have Ryan on the show because we’re on the cusp of the SpaceX IPO, which promises to be one of the most consequential public offerings in history for a variety of reasons — its biggest-ever size, of course, at nearly $2 trillion dollars , but also because all kinds of rules that keep our markets fair are being bent, if not outright broken, along the way . I…
items.why_zh: SpaceX的IPO规模空前且规则被打破，可能重塑科技公司上市模式，对金融市场产生深远影响。
items.why_en: SpaceX's unprecedented IPO and rule-breaking could reshape tech company listings, with profound impacts on financial markets.

items.title_zh: 美国法院如何应对AI生成诉讼的激增
items.title_en: How courts are coping with a flood of AI-generated lawsuits
items.summary_zh: 美国联邦治安法官Maritza Braswell发现，近年来无律师代理的诉讼案件显著增加，其中许多由AI生成。一项研究分析了2005年至2026年的450万件联邦民事案件，显示自诉案件比例上升。这些AI生成的诉讼往往质量低劣，但法院仍需逐一审查，增加了司法负担。法官们正在探索应对策略，如加强筛查和提供指导，以平衡司法效率与诉诸司法的权利。
items.summary_en: Most days in her chambers, Judge Maritza Braswell, a federal magistrate judge in Colorado, sifts through stacks of documents written by people without a lawyer. Many of them can’t afford to hire a lawyer, and others have cases too weak or too small to interest one. She reads each one carefully, mindful of how daunting it is to walk into the courtroom alone. Lately, like many judges across the US, she has seen a noticeable uptick in such filings. According to a new study that examined 4.5 million federal civil cases from 2005 to 2026, the share of lawsuits brought by self-represented people inc…
items.why_zh: AI生成诉讼的激增对司法系统构成新挑战，法院的应对策略将影响未来法律技术的使用和司法公正。
items.why_en: The surge in AI-generated lawsuits challenges the judicial system; courts' responses will shape future legal tech use and justice.

items.title_zh: 黄仁勋与多位韩企掌门人在烤肉店共进晚餐，称英伟达已着手在韩国新建 AI 技术中心项目
items.title_en: Huang Renxun Dines with Korean Business Leaders, Announces New AI Tech Center in Korea
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 5 日消息，据韩联社今日报道，英伟达首席执行官黄仁勋今晚在首尔麻浦区弘大入口站附近的一家韩式烤肉店与韩国 SK 集团会长崔泰源、LG 集团会长具光谟、NAVER 董事会主席李海珍共进晚餐。当晚的菜品为烤五花肉与韩国烧酒。 黄仁勋在抵达聚会地点后接受媒体采访时表示，他为韩国带来了英伟达的四项新业务，作为一份“惊喜”。 据黄仁勋介绍，“四大业务”包括英伟达下一代人工智能（AI）超级芯片平台“ Vera Rubin ”、“ Vera ”中央处理器（CPU）、英伟达首款 AI 笔记本电脑系列“ RTX Spark ”，以及专为下一代人形机器人和物理 AI 而设计的边缘 AI 计算平台“ Jetson Thor ”。 黄仁勋还表示， 英伟达已着手在韩新建 AI 技术中心项目 ，正在录用韩国 AI 技术研究工程师、机器人工程技术人员。 据IT之家此前报道，黄仁勋去年访韩时与现代汽车集团会长郑义宣和三星电子会长李在镕 在首尔江南区三成洞某炸鸡店共进晚餐 。今日郑义宣和李在镕均因其他日程而无法参加聚会，但预计郑义宣将于 8 日在现代汽车首尔瑞草区的总部与黄仁勋会面。
items.summary_en: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang dined with Korean business leaders, announcing four new businesses including Vera Rubin and a new AI tech center in Korea, hiring AI and robotics engineers.
items.why_zh: 英伟达在韩国的投资和业务扩展表明其深化与韩国科技巨头的合作，并加速AI基础设施的全球布局。
items.why_en: Nvidia's investment in Korea signals deeper collaboration with Korean tech giants and accelerates global AI infrastructure deployment.

items.title_zh: 英特尔与鸿海战略合作，携手推动 AI 机柜、边缘与物理 AI 发展
items.title_en: Intel and Hon Hai Strategic Partnership to Advance AI Racks, Edge, and Physical AI
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 5 日消息，鸿海科技集团昨日宣布将与英特尔进行战略合作，结合英特尔在处理器、硅光子技术与软件生态系统的优势及鸿海在全球制造、系统整合与 AI 数据中心部署能力上的深厚基础。 双方将共同探索从芯片、机柜（机架）、系统到应用的全方位 AI 解决方案，并加速由 AI 驱动的技术推动边缘和 Physical（物理 / 实体）AI 应用。 首先，在 AI 机柜（机架）领域，两家企业将 探索开发与商业化机柜级 AI 基础设施解决方案 ，涵盖以英特尔至强处理器为基础的机柜与 AI 加速器架构，并共同推进高速互连、散热与液冷设计、系统监测，以及 AI 数据中心扩展性等关键技术，提供更高效能与高能源效率的 AI 部署解决方案。 双方在边缘和物理 / 实体 AI 领域将 共同定义下一代平台架构 ，布局代理式 AI、终端智能与机器人等应用方向。此合作将进一步推动和支持智能制造、智慧城市、车用与机器人等多元场景。 此外，双方亦将 探索于定制 ASIC、SoC 与系统整合等设计服务上的合作机会 ，结合英特尔的完整芯片能力与鸿海完整的设计制造生态系统，此合作涵盖芯片、模块与系统，将拓展全球市场商机。 鸿海科技集团董事长刘扬伟表示： AI 正快速重塑全球产业与社会运作模式，鸿海凭藉『3+3+3』策略，积极布局 AI、半导体与次世代通讯等核心技术，并推进智能制造、智慧电动车与智慧城市三大平台发展…
items.summary_en: Hon Hai and Intel partner to develop full-stack AI solutions from chips to applications, focusing on AI racks, edge and physical AI, and custom ASIC design, targeting smart manufacturing, cities, automotive, and robotics.
items.why_zh: 英特尔与鸿海的合作整合了芯片设计与制造能力，有望加速AI基础设施的标准化和规模化部署。
items.why_en: The Intel-Hon Hai partnership combines chip design and manufacturing, potentially accelerating standardization and large-scale AI infrastructure deployment.

items.title_zh: 台积电 CEO 魏哲家谈马斯克“晶圆厂月产百万片”雄心：祝好运
items.title_en: TSMC CEO CC Wei on Musk's Fab Ambition: Good Luck
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 5 日消息，据日经亚洲报道，在 4 日的台积电年度股东大会上，台积电董事长兼 CEO 魏哲家表示，埃隆 · 马斯克从零开始建设大规模尖端芯片工厂的计划，距离真正落地还需要很长时间。魏哲家同时强调，面对英特尔、三星以及芯片制造领域的其他竞争者，台积电并不害怕。 有股东问到马斯克计划建设月产 100 万片晶圆工厂一事。魏哲家回答说：“对于马斯克的 TeraFab， 我只能说‘祝好运’。要实现需要相当长时间 。” 魏哲家还谈到台积电与英特尔的关系。英特尔长期以来都是台积电客户，但随着英特尔扩大晶圆代工和芯片封装服务， 英特尔与台积电的竞争正在增加 ，而不再只是生产自用芯片。“现在英特尔仍是我们的前十大客户之一。我们希望从英特尔身上赚钱，同时也会继续保护自己的知识产权和商业秘密。” 据IT之家此前报道，今年 5 月，马斯克旗下的 SpaceX 在 S-1 上市申请文件中坦言，若要全面推进轨道 AI 相关布局并实现规模化落地，公司目前无法获取足够的 AI 硬件设备，Terafab 晶圆厂项目 或许能缓解“缺芯”问题 ，但同时也存在失败风险，且目前的合作方特斯拉与英特尔并无长期参与该项目的义务。 相关阅读： 《 SpaceX 坦言 AI 芯片供给不足，TeraFab 项目可能无法取得成功 》
items.summary_en: TSMC CEO CC Wei wished Elon Musk luck on his TeraFab plan, saying it will take a long time. He noted increasing competition with Intel, which remains a top-10 customer. SpaceX previously admitted chip shortages and risks in the project.
items.why_zh: 魏哲家的评论反映了业界对马斯克晶圆厂计划的怀疑态度，同时凸显了台积电在先进制程领域的自信与竞争格局。
items.why_en: Wei's comments reflect industry skepticism toward Musk's fab plan, while highlighting TSMC's confidence and competitive position in advanced manufacturing.

items.title_zh: 1099 → 358 元：小米 G100 智能门锁国补探底，AI 指纹识别 + 九种开锁方式
items.title_en: Xiaomi Smart Lock G100 Sale: AI Fingerprint + 9 Unlock Methods, 88VIP Price 358 Yuan
items.summary_zh: 小米 3 月 10 日上架“小米智能门锁 G100”，其主打 AI 指纹识别、9 种开锁方式， 定价为 1099 元 ，本月日常秒杀价 529 元（ 点此查看 ）。 今日天猫自营“天猫优品官方旗舰店”开启 618 狂促： 普通用户大概率能领到 400-40 元消费券 → 实付 375 元 88VIP 能领 480-60 元消费券 → 实付 358 元 有需求的小伙伴可以试试看，价格实属破冰新低。 点击下方卡片后，需点击右侧浮窗 “直播专享” 下单哦： 天猫 小米智能门锁 G100 E30 同款 直播间 358 元起 直达链接 下单价格如果不对，可尝试手动领取宝贝 售价下方的“消费券” 哦，本次 618 淘宝给大多数用户都自动开通了消费券权限。 该门锁采用直插入 C 级锁芯设计，将离合内置于锁体。门锁支持 AI 指纹、密码、蓝牙、应急钥匙、NFC 门卡（需另购）、米家 App 开锁。门锁还内置胁迫指纹求助功能，用户可以预先设置胁迫指纹，遭遇危机时可以使用相应指纹解锁，此时设备会向预设电话号码静默呼叫求助。 该门锁使用 4 节 5 号电池供电，至高提供 12 个月续航，同时门锁底部配备 USB-C 接口可实现应急供电。 IT之家附门锁参数： 天猫 小米智能门锁 G100 E30 同款 直播间 358 元起 直达链接 京东 618 无门槛红包 面额至高 26618 元，每天抽 3 次：…
items.summary_en: Xiaomi launched the Smart Lock G100 on March 10, featuring AI fingerprint recognition and 9 unlock methods, originally priced at 1099 yuan. During the 618 promotion on Tmall, ordinary users can get it for 375 yuan, while 88VIP users can get it for 358 yuan, a new low. The lock uses a Grade C cylinder, supports multiple unlock methods, and has a 12-month battery life.
items.why_zh: 该促销价格大幅降低了智能门锁的入手门槛，且产品功能齐全，对消费者有较强吸引力。
items.why_en: This promotion significantly lowers the entry price for a feature-rich smart lock, making it highly attractive to consumers.

items.title_zh: 追觅科技创始人俞浩内部发文：将心无旁骛做实业，去啃全球最难的市场
items.title_en: Dreame Technology Founder Yu Hao Internal Memo: Focus on Manufacturing, Target World's Hardest Markets
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 5 日消息，追觅科技创始人兼 CEO 俞浩今日 在公司内部发文。他透露，2026 年第一季度追觅扫地机器人已在全球市场同时取得销量和销售额第一的成绩，并表示公司未来仍将把重心放在技术研发和产品创新上。 俞浩表示，当看到相关成绩时，自己的感受较为平静，并认为公司本可以更早实现这一目标。他表示，未来追觅将继续专注制造业和技术创新，在全球市场推进业务发展，同时持续增加研发投入，将资源投入到解决用户实际需求的领域。 值得关注的是，俞浩此次内部发声的背景正值外界对追觅及其本人持续关注之际。今日有市场消息称，江苏部分地区正在统计辖区企业与追觅科技的合作情况。对此，有相关人士向媒体表示，相关统计属于常规工作，并不存在特殊指向。与此同时，俞浩个人微博账号当天显示因违反相关法律法规处于禁言状态。截至目前，追觅科技尚未就上述事项发布公开说明。 公开资料显示，俞浩出生于 1987 年，毕业于清华大学航天航空学院，是追觅科技创始人。近年来，随着追觅业务从扫地机器人扩展至洗地机、大家电、汽车等多个领域，俞浩本人也频繁出现在公众视野中。其关于企业发展目标、生态布局以及跨界扩张的多项公开言论曾引发市场讨论。 相关阅读： 《 因违反相关法律法规，追觅科技 CEO 俞浩微博账号被禁言 》 《 追觅俞浩回应“崩老头”：今有黑心流氓媒体公司，我有仇必报而且十倍还击 》 《 追觅高管回应“长三角某市辖区…
items.summary_en: Dreame Technology founder Yu Hao stated in an internal memo that the company's robot vacuum achieved global No.1 in sales and revenue in Q1 2026. He expressed calmness and said the company could have achieved this earlier. Dreame will continue focusing on manufacturing and R&D. This comes amid external attention; Yu's Weibo account was suspended for violating regulations.
items.why_zh: 追觅在扫地机器人领域取得全球第一，标志着中国品牌在高端制造领域的突破，同时创始人言论和账号状态引发市场关注。
items.why_en: Dreame's global No.1 in robot vacuums marks a breakthrough for Chinese brands in high-end manufacturing, while the founder's remarks and account status draw market attention.

items.title_zh: GITCO：门控推理时上下文优化，提升时间序列基础模型准确性
items.title_en: GITCO: Gated Inference-Time Context Optimization in TSFMs
items.summary_zh: arXiv论文提出GITCO（门控推理时上下文优化）框架，用于解决基于补丁的时间序列基础模型（TSFM）中的上下文中毒问题。上下文中毒指结构异常的补丁会不成比例地吸引注意力，从而降低零样本预测质量。GITCO包含门控、路由和批评三个轻量级组件，在不修改模型权重的情况下，在推理时选择性地识别并抑制有害补丁。实验在多个数据集上验证了其有效性。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.05332v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Patch-based Time Series Foundation Models (TSFMs) suffer from context poisoning: structurally anomalous patches capture disproportionate attention and silently degrade zero-shot forecast quality. We propose improving TSFM accuracy at inference time by optimizing the input context rather than modifying model weights. We present GITCO (Gated Inference-Time Context Optimization), a lightweight three-component framework: Gate, Router, and Critic that selectively identifies and suppresses harmful patches without any parameter updates. Evaluated on Tim…
items.why_zh: 该工作提供了一种无需重新训练即可提升时间序列模型推理准确性的方法，具有实际应用价值。
items.why_en: This work offers a method to improve time series model accuracy at inference without retraining, which is practically valuable.

items.title_zh: 面向循环工厂的不确定性感知功能行为预测与材料疲劳评估
items.title_en: Uncertainty Aware Functional Behavior Prediction and Material Fatigue Assessment for Circular Factory
items.summary_zh: arXiv论文针对循环工厂中返回产品的异质性退化状态和剩余能力，提出一种不确定性感知的功能行为预测与材料疲劳评估方法。现有PHM方法通常针对固定工况或孤立组件，而该论文将材料疲劳评估与系统级功能预后相结合，以支持产品再利用决策。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.05334v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Returned products in circular factories re-enter production with heterogeneous degradation states, usage histories, and remaining capability. Reuse cannot be decided from the current inspection alone, because future function fulfillment and component integrity may evolve differently under the next service scenario. Existing PHM approaches support degradation prediction, but often target fixed operating conditions or isolated component benchmarks, while material-fatigue assessment is rarely linked to system-level functional prognosis. This paper a…
items.why_zh: 该研究有助于提升循环工厂中产品再利用的决策可靠性，推动可持续制造。
items.why_en: This research improves decision reliability for product reuse in circular factories, promoting sustainable manufacturing.

items.title_zh: SentinelBench：面向长时间运行监控智能体的基准测试
items.title_en: SentinelBench: A Benchmark for Long-Running Monitoring Agents
items.summary_zh: arXiv论文提出SentinelBench，一个用于评估长时间运行监控智能体的基准测试。当前AI智能体默认行为是持续行动，但许多长时间任务更适合持续关注策略：监控环境，等待外部事件发生后再响应。SentinelBench旨在衡量智能体在长时间任务中保持注意力并适时响应的能力。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.05342v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: AI agents are increasingly asked to carry out work that spans minutes, hours, or longer. Yet the default model of agent behavior is continuous action: issuing tool calls, refreshing pages, searching for alternatives, or otherwise trying to force progress. This is the wrong approach for many long-running tasks, which are better served by a strategy of sustained attention. Instead, agents should monitor an environment, notice when an external event makes progress possible, then respond promptly without wasting resources while waiting. To measure pr…
items.why_zh: 该基准填补了长时间运行智能体评估的空白，对开发高效监控系统具有重要意义。
items.why_en: This benchmark fills a gap in evaluating long-running agents, crucial for developing efficient monitoring systems.

items.title_zh: 可解释可信AI框架：基于OAI数据的大规模纵向结构-疼痛关联研究
items.title_en: An interpretable and trustworthy AI framework for large-scale longitudinal structure-pain association studies using data from the Osteoarthritis Initiative (OAI)
items.summary_zh: arXiv论文开发了一个可解释且可信的AI框架，结合基于深度学习的MRI膝关节骨关节炎评分（MOAKS）预测与可解释统计建模，利用骨关节炎倡议（OAI）数据大规模研究结构-疼痛关系。该框架包含共形预测以提供预测不确定性量化，从而实现对不可靠预测的显式过滤，提高关联研究的可靠性。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.05357v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Purpose: To develop an interpretable and trustworthy AI framework that combines deep learning based MRI Osteoarthritis Knee Score (MOAKS) prediction with interpretable statistical modeling to study structure-pain relationships at scale using data from the Osteoarthritis Initiative (OAI). Materials and Methods: We first developed a deep learning framework to predict MOAKS features directly from knee MRIs and incorporated conformal prediction to provide prediction uncertainty quantification. This uncertainty-aware strategy enables explicit filterin…
items.why_zh: 该框架提高了大规模医学影像关联研究的可解释性和可信度，对骨关节炎临床研究有重要价值。
items.why_en: This framework enhances interpretability and trustworthiness in large-scale medical imaging association studies, valuable for osteoarthritis research.

items.title_zh: 稳定性与可操纵性：评估LLM裁判在决策后交互下的鲁棒性
items.title_en: Stability vs. Manipulability: Evaluating Robustness Under Post-Decision Interaction in LLM Judges
items.summary_zh: arXiv论文研究LLM作为裁判时的决策后可操纵性，即初始决策后通过与裁判的后续对话改变评估结果的程度。实验在MT-Bench和AlpacaEval上进行，发现LLM裁判的判决在交互下并不稳定，存在被操纵的风险。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.05384v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: LLM-as-judge evaluation is widely used in benchmarking pipelines, where model outputs are compared and ranked using automated evaluators. These pipelines typically assume that judgments are stable properties of fixed inputs. We show that this assumption does not hold under interaction. We study post-decision manipulability: the extent to which an evaluation outcome can be altered through subsequent conversation with the judge after an initial decision has been made. Across controlled experiments on MT-Bench and AlpacaEval, we find that LLM judges…
items.why_zh: 该研究揭示了LLM评估流程中的潜在漏洞，对确保AI评估的公正性至关重要。
items.why_en: This research reveals vulnerabilities in LLM evaluation pipelines, crucial for ensuring fairness in AI assessments.

items.title_zh: 智能体终极考试：评估AI在长期经济价值任务上的表现
items.title_en: Agents' Last Exam
items.summary_zh: arXiv论文提出智能体终极考试（ALE），一个旨在评估AI智能体在长期、经济价值高、真实世界任务上的基准测试。当前AI在众多基准上表现优异，但未转化为经济上有意义的部署。ALE通过与领域专家合作开发，任务具有可验证结果，旨在弥合基准表现与实际部署之间的差距。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.05405v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Recent AI systems have achieved strong results on a wide range of benchmarks, yet these gains have not translated into economically meaningful deployment across many professional domains. We argue that this gap is largely an evaluation problem: widely used benchmarks lack sustained performance measurement on real and economically valuable workflows. This paper introduces Agents' Last Exam (ALE), a benchmark designed to evaluate AI agents on long-horizon, economically valuable, real-world tasks with verifiable outcomes. Developed in collaboration…
items.why_zh: 该基准直接针对AI经济价值落地的关键瓶颈，对推动AI实际应用具有重要意义。
items.why_en: This benchmark directly addresses the key bottleneck of AI's economic value deployment, crucial for advancing practical AI applications.

items.title_zh: 无变异突变：LLM驱动程序演化中的收敛动力学
items.title_en: Mutation Without Variation: Convergence Dynamics in LLM-Driven Program Evolution
items.summary_zh: 该研究探讨了当大型语言模型（LLM）反复变异一个程序时，是探索新形式还是回到旧形式。通过在没有选择压力的领域特定语言中分析LLM驱动的突变链，并改变提示设计、模型家族和随机复制，发现基于LLM的突变始终收敛到程序空间中的受限吸引子区域。结构层面的收敛尤为严重：在87%的链中，超过93%的突变重复了之前见过的结构形式。这表明LLM在程序演化中缺乏多样性，可能限制其创新潜力。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.05408v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: When an LLM repeatedly mutates a program, does it explore new forms or circle back to the same ones? We study this question by analyzing LLM-driven mutation chains in the absence of selection pressure within a domain-specific language, varying prompt design, model family, and stochastic replication. We find that LLM-based mutation consistently converges toward restricted attractor regions in program space. Convergence is especially severe at the structural level: in 87% of chains, over 93% of mutations revisit a previously seen structural form, w…
items.why_zh: 揭示了LLM在程序演化中缺乏多样性的根本局限，对AI自主编程和进化算法的设计有重要启示。
items.why_en: Reveals a fundamental limitation of LLMs in program evolution, with implications for AI-driven programming and evolutionary algorithm design.

items.title_en: Zero knowledge verification for frontier AI training is possible
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.05433v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Frontier AI governance frameworks increasingly use cumulative training compute as the primary criterion for designating high-impact models, but enforcement rests on self-reporting because no technical verification primitive for training exists. Any future international agreement on frontier AI faces the same problem at higher stakes: coordinated regulation of technologies with significant externalities has historically rested on technical verification, without which agreements are declaratory. Recent governance analyses judge zero-knowledge proof…

items.title_zh: Brick-Composer：利用多模态大语言模型进行多样化积木组装
items.title_en: Brick-Composer: Using MLLMs for Assembly with Diverse Bricks
items.summary_zh: 该研究探索了多模态大语言模型（MLLM）在积木组装任务中的视觉基础和空间推理能力。将积木组装建模为序列决策问题，每一步包括两个子任务：积木选择（从候选组件中识别目标积木）和积木姿态估计（预测所选积木的位置和方向）。实验表明，MLLM能够理解设计图并执行组装，但复杂场景下仍有挑战。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.05445v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We dream of AI agents that can read arbitrary designs and construct real-world objects from reusable building blocks. As a first step toward this vision, we study whether multimodal large language models (MLLMs) possess the visual grounding and spatial reasoning capabilities required for brick assembly. We formulate brick assembly as a sequential decision-making problem, where each step involves two subtasks: brick selection, identifying the target brick from candidate components, and brick pose estimation, predicting where and how the selected b…
items.why_zh: 展示了MLLM在实体物体组装中的潜力，为机器人自主构建和智能制造提供了新思路。
items.why_en: Demonstrates MLLM potential in physical object assembly, offering new directions for robotic construction and smart manufacturing.

items.title_zh: EpiEvolve：面向流式疫情预测的自演化智能体
items.title_en: EpiEvolve: Self-Evolving Agents for Streaming Pandemic Forecasting under Regime Shifts
items.summary_zh: 传统的疫情预测LLM通常作为静态监督模型训练和评估，而实际预测是流式过程，标签在预测后到达，疾病机制随时间变化。该研究针对每周COVID-19住院趋势预测，在五个变异机制下评估了这种不匹配。提出了EpiEvolve，一种自演化智能体，它包装了一个在预热期训练的LLM预测器，并在流式过程中保持权重固定。EpiEvolve通过将预测结果存储在层次化记忆中来自适应调整。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.05513v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Epidemic LLM forecasters are usually trained and evaluated as static supervised models, whereas operational pandemic forecasting is a streaming process in which labels arrive after predictions and disease regimes shift over time. We study this mismatch in weekly COVID-19 hospitalization trend forecasting across five variant regimes. We introduce EpiEvolve, a self-evolving agent that wraps an LLM forecaster trained on the warm-start period and keeps its weights fixed during streaming. EpiEvolve adapts by storing forecast outcomes in a hierarchical…
items.why_zh: 解决了疫情预测中静态模型与动态现实的不匹配问题，为实时流行病预测提供了自适应方案。
items.why_en: Addresses the mismatch between static pandemic forecasting models and dynamic real-world conditions, offering an adaptive solution for real-time epidemic prediction.

items.title_zh: GuardNet：基于浅层神经网络集成的鲁棒提示注入与越狱检测
items.title_en: GuardNet: Ensemble Strategies of Shallow Neural Networks for Robust Prompt Injection and Jailbreak Detection
items.summary_zh: 大型语言模型容易受到提示注入和越狱攻击，且基准评估可能因污染和信息泄露而受影响。该工作提出了GuardNet，一个基于浅层神经网络（BiLSTM）集成的护栏系统，约4700万参数。研究假设对抗场景下的鲁棒性更多取决于示例多样性而非模型复杂度。实验表明，GuardNet在检测攻击方面表现良好，且对基准污染具有鲁棒性。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.05566v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have transformed natural language processing, but they remain vulnerable to Prompt Injection (PI) and Jailbreak (JB) attacks. In addition, benchmark evaluations may be affected by contamination and partial information leakage, compromising performance estimates. This work presents GuardNet, a guardrail system based on an ensemble of shallow neural networks (BiLSTMs) with approximately 47 million parameters. We investigate the hypothesis that robustness in adversarial scenarios depends more on the diversity of example…
items.why_zh: 提供了一种轻量级且鲁棒的LLM安全防护方案，对实际部署中的攻击检测有重要价值。
items.why_en: Offers a lightweight and robust guardrail system for LLM security, valuable for real-world attack detection.

items.title_zh: 多语言微调：通过局部梯度冲突解决实现
items.title_en: Multilingual Fine-Tuning via Localized Gradient Conflict Resolution
items.summary_zh: 大型语言模型的多语言微调常导致跨语言负向干扰。该研究将多语言微调重新表述为多目标优化问题，提出了Bucket-Level MOO，一种可扩展的分布式框架，在参数桶上局部应用基于梯度的多目标优化算法。这使得冲突感知更新成为可能，同时避免了高昂的通信开销。实验表明，该方法有效减少了语言间的负向干扰，提升了多语言性能。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.05613v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The rapid evolution of Large Language Models (LLMs) has established cross-lingual versatility as a defining feature of modern systems. However, fine-tuning these models frequently induces negative interference across languages. To address this, we reformulate multilingual fine-tuning as a multi-objective optimization (MOO) problem. Specifically, we introduce Bucket-Level MOO, a scalable distributed framework that applies gradient-based MOO algorithms locally on parameter buckets. This enables conflict-aware updates without the prohibitive communi…
items.why_zh: 提出了一种高效的多语言微调方法，解决了语言间负向干扰的关键问题，对多语言AI系统开发具有重要意义。
items.why_en: Proposes an efficient method for multilingual fine-tuning that mitigates negative interference, crucial for developing multilingual AI systems.

items.title_zh: 安全悖论：增强的安全意识使LLM易受后验攻击
items.title_en: Safety Paradox: How Enhanced Safety Awareness Leaves LLMs Vulnerable to Posterior Attack
items.summary_zh: 大型语言模型经过严格对齐以拒绝有害请求，这一过程培养了评估和识别不安全内容的潜在能力。该研究揭示了这种高级安全意识意外引入了一个致命漏洞。提出了后验攻击，一种单次查询越狱方法，通过提示模型生成其内部分类器通常会标记为不安全的精确有害响应来绕过护栏。在30个开源LLM上的广泛实证评估表明，该攻击成功率很高。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.05614v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are rigorously aligned to refuse harmful requests, a process that inherently cultivates a latent capacity to evaluate and recognize unsafe content. In this work, we reveal that this advanced safety awareness inadvertently introduces a fatal vulnerability. We introduce Posterior Attack, a single-query jailbreak that bypasses guardrails by prompting the model to generate the exact harmful response its internal classifier would normally flag as unsafe. Through extensive empirical evaluation across 30 open-source LLMs (up…
items.why_zh: 揭示了安全对齐本身可能引入新漏洞的悖论，对LLM安全研究具有重要警示意义。
items.why_en: Reveals a paradox where safety alignment can introduce new vulnerabilities, with critical implications for LLM security research.

items.title_zh: 自承诺延迟：一种无奖励探针的隐式提示劫持检测方法
items.title_en: Self-Commitment Latency: A Reward-Free Probe for Prompted Implicit Hacking
items.summary_zh: 隐式奖励劫持难以审计，因为语言模型的思维链可能看似良性：最终答案可能被提示捷径锚定，而书面推理仍像普通问题解决。基于验证器的探针通过测量早期截断的推理上下文获得高奖励来暴露此类行为，但需要任务特定的奖励信号。该论文提出了自承诺延迟，一种弱输入替代方法，测量提示推理上下文多早承诺于模型自己的最终答案。实验表明，该方法能有效检测隐式劫持。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.05625v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Implicit reward hacking is hard to audit when a language model's chain of thought appears benign: a final answer may be anchored by a prompt shortcut while the written reasoning still resembles ordinary problem solving. Verifier-based probes expose such behavior by measuring how early truncated reasoning contexts obtain high reward, but require a task-specific reward signal. This paper proposes a weaker-input alternative, self-commitment latency, which measures how early a prompted reasoning context commits to the model's own final answer. We eva…
items.why_zh: 提供了一种无需奖励信号的隐式劫持检测方法，简化了LLM行为审计，对AI安全有实际价值。
items.why_en: Offers a reward-free method for detecting implicit reward hacking, simplifying LLM behavior auditing and contributing to AI safety.

items.title_zh: LLM在Lean中数学形式化的评估
items.title_en: Evaluation of LLMs for Mathematical Formalization in Lean
items.summary_zh: arXiv:2606.05632v1 新论文。近年来，大型语言模型（LLM）生成形式化数学证明的能力大幅提升。本文比较了多种LLM在Lean 4中生成形式化证明的效果，旨在帮助用户选择适合自己项目的模型。研究采用pass@k和refine@k指标，在miniF2F和miniCTX数据集子集上进行评估。结果显示，Gemini 3.1 Pro和Claude Opus 4.7总体表现最佳。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.05632v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Within the past few years, the ability of Large Language Models (LLMs) to generate formal mathematical proofs has improved drastically. We provide a comparison of various LLMs' effectiveness in producing formal proofs in Lean 4 with the goal of assisting those seeking to use LLMs to support their own projects. We utilize both pass@$k$ and refine@$k$ metrics as the benchmark for our comparison and evaluate on subsets of both miniF2F and miniCTX datasets. Our testing shows that overall, Gemini 3.1 Pro and Claude Opus 4.7 perform best. Gemini 3.1 Pr…
items.why_zh: 为使用LLM辅助形式化数学证明的研究者和工程师提供了模型选择的基准。
items.why_en: Provides a benchmark for selecting LLMs to assist in formal mathematical proof generation.

items.title_zh: 更多智能体有帮助吗？LLM智能体工作流的受控与协议对齐评估
items.title_en: Do More Agents Help? Controlled and Protocol-Aligned Evaluation of LLM Agent Workflows
items.summary_zh: arXiv:2606.05670v1 新论文。本文提出BenchAgent评估框架，将单智能体、固定多智能体（MAS）和演化MAS工作流置于统一的执行和日志协议下。在10个推理、编码和工具使用基准上使用GPT-4.1进行评估，并单独报告了协议对齐外部（PAE）GAIA研究。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.05670v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Does adding more agents help an LLM workflow once compared systems share the same benchmark loader, tool access, answer contract, usage accounting, and trajectory logging? We introduce BenchAgent, an evaluation framework that places single-agent, fixed multi-agent (MAS), and evolving MAS workflows under one normalized execution and logging protocol. BenchAgent evaluates these substrate-internal workflows across ten reasoning, coding, and tool-use benchmarks with GPT-4.1, and separately reports a Protocol-Aligned External (PAE) GAIA study of a run…
items.why_zh: 为LLM多智能体工作流的有效性提供了标准化评估方法。
items.why_en: Provides a standardized evaluation framework for assessing the effectiveness of multi-agent LLM workflows.

items.title_zh: 看见时间：视觉语言模型中的时序推理与捷径偏差基准测试
items.title_en: Seeing Time: Benchmarking Chronological Reasoning and Shortcut Biases in Vision-Language Models
items.summary_zh: arXiv:2606.05702v1 新论文。视觉语言模型（VLM）在理解复杂视觉语义方面取得进展，但其时序推理能力尚未充分探索。本文引入一个新基准，专门评估VLM如何感知和推理图像内和跨图像的时序信息。与现有视频基准不同，该工作深入时序判断的逻辑和多模态整合。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.05702v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Recent advancements in Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have significantly enhanced their ability to interpret complex visual semantics, yet their capacity for chronological reasoning remains under-explored. In this paper, we introduce a novel benchmark specifically designed to evaluate how VLMs perceive and reason about chronological information within and across images. Unlike existing video-based benchmarks that focus on frame sequencing, our work delves into the underlying logic of chronological judgment and the expansion toward multimodal integ…
items.why_zh: 填补了VLM时序推理能力评估的空白，揭示了模型在时间理解上的局限性。
items.why_en: Fills a gap in evaluating VLMs' temporal reasoning, highlighting limitations in time understanding.

items.title_zh: 批评引导的异构多智能体推理用于可靠数学问题求解
items.title_en: Critic-Guided Heterogeneous Multi-Agent Reasoning for Reliable Mathematical Problem Solving
items.summary_zh: arXiv:2606.05704v1 新论文。大型语言模型在复杂数学推理中仍易出现幻觉和中间错误。本文提出基于批评的异构多智能体方法，整合多个不同专长的LLM智能体，并采用批评驱动的自适应学习系统评估和引导推理过程，以提高数学推理的可靠性。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.05704v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Recent Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown impressive reasoning abilities; but they are still susceptible to hallucinations, intermediate reasoning mistakes, and unreliable reasoning results in complex mathematical reasoning problems. In this study, we introduce a critic-based heterogeneous multi-agent approach to improve the dependability of mathematical reasoning. This framework incorporates several LLM agents of different specialties and employs a critic-driven adaptive learning system to assess and guide the reasoning process based on int…
items.why_zh: 通过多智能体协作与批评机制，显著提升了LLM在复杂数学推理中的可靠性。
items.why_en: Enhances reliability of LLMs in complex mathematical reasoning via multi-agent collaboration and critic guidance.

items.title_zh: DiG-Plan：通过扩散引导缓解工具图规划中的早期承诺
items.title_en: DiG-Plan: Mitigating Early Commitment for Tool-Graph Planning via Diffusion Guidance
items.summary_zh: arXiv:2606.05728v1 新论文。生成可执行工具计划需要从工具库中选择合适子集，这是一个组合搜索问题。标准自回归解码存在早期承诺问题，初始选择会刚性约束搜索轨迹。受控研究表明，在相同计算量下，掩码去噪将Pass@10解覆盖率从0.320提升至0.943。本文提出DiG-Plan方法。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.05728v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Generating executable tool plans requires selecting appropriate subsets from tool libraries, a combinatorial search problem with an exponentially large solution space. However, we identify a critical misalignment in predominant approaches: standard autoregressive (AR) decoding suffers from early commitment, where initial token choices rigidly constrain the search trajectory. A controlled study shows that masked denoising raises Pass@10 solution coverage from 0.320 to 0.943 over AR sampling under matched compute. Motivated by this, we propose DiG-…
items.why_zh: 解决了工具规划中自回归解码的早期承诺问题，大幅提升了解空间覆盖率。
items.why_en: Addresses early commitment in autoregressive decoding for tool planning, significantly improving solution coverage.

items.title_zh: LLM能写出正确的TLA+规范吗？自然语言到TLA+生成的评估
items.title_en: Can LLMs Write Correct TLA+ Specifications? Evaluating Natural-Language-to-TLA+ Generation
items.summary_zh: arXiv:2606.05792v1 新论文。TLA+已在亚马逊和微软等公司用于工业验证，但从自然语言编写正确的TLA+规范仍需时间和专业知识。本文首次系统评估了基于LLM的TLA+规范合成，在205个TLA+规范数据集上评估了8个家族的30个LLM。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.05792v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: TLA+ has supported industrial verification at companies such as Amazon and Microsoft, yet writing correct TLA+ specifications from natural language still requires time and expertise, which limits adoption. LLMs show promise, but no prior study measures whether they produce semantically correct TLA+ specifications from natural language. This paper presents the first systematic evaluation of LLM-based TLA+ specification synthesis from natural language. Our study evaluates 30 LLMs across eight families on a curated dataset of 205 TLA+ specifications…
items.why_zh: 首次系统评估了LLM生成TLA+规范的能力，为形式化验证的自动化提供了重要参考。
items.why_en: First systematic evaluation of LLMs for TLA+ specification generation, aiding automation in formal verification.

items.title_zh: 当工具失败时：LLM智能体动态重规划和异常恢复的基准测试
items.title_en: When Tools Fail: Benchmarking Dynamic Replanning and Anomaly Recovery in LLM Agents
items.summary_zh: arXiv:2606.05806v1 新论文。现有基准在理想路径上评估工具集成推理，忽略了真实世界的工具故障。本文提出ToolMaze基准，用于动态路径发现和错误恢复。采用二维设计：基于DAG的拓扑复杂度和工具扰动的2×2分类（显式/隐式、瞬态/永久）。评估显示扰动几乎降低了所有模型的性能。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.05806v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Existing benchmarks evaluate Tool-Integrated Reasoning (TIR) in LLMs on idealized ''happy paths'', largely overlooking real-world tool failures. We introduce ToolMaze, a benchmark for dynamic path discovery and error recovery in TIR agents. To separate systematic replanning from blind trial-and-error, ToolMaze adopts a two-dimensional design: DAG-based topological complexity and a $2 \times 2$ taxonomy of tool perturbations (explicit/implicit, transient/permanent). Evaluations show that perturbations degrade performance across nearly all models,…
items.why_zh: 填补了LLM智能体在工具故障下动态重规划能力评估的空白。
items.why_en: Fills a gap in evaluating LLM agents' dynamic replanning under real-world tool failures.

items.title_zh: 隐式偏好的统计先验：在个人智能体中解耦技能选择作为本地约束
items.title_en: Statistical Priors for Implicit Preferences: Decoupling Skill Selection as a Local Harness in Personal Agents
items.summary_zh: arXiv:2606.05828v1 新论文。随着LLM能力提升，基于API远程模型和外部技能的本地部署个人智能体成为新范式。技能快速扩展使得学习用户隐式偏好成为关键挑战。本地部署限制排除了复杂集中式选择算法，本文通过新颖方法探索轻量级本地偏好约束的实现。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.05828v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: As Large Language Model (LLM) capabilities advance, locally deployed personal agents relying on API-based remote models and external skills have emerged as a novel paradigm. With the rapid expansion of available skills, enabling personal agents to learn and adapt to implicit user preferences becomes a critical challenge. However, local deployment constraints preclude complex centralized selection algorithms, creating an urgent need for a lightweight local preference harness. This paper explores the implementation of such a harness through a novel…
items.why_zh: 为本地部署的个人智能体提供了一种轻量级隐式偏好学习方案。
items.why_en: Offers a lightweight solution for implicit preference learning in locally deployed personal agents.

items.title_zh: 回顾性工具优化：通过轨迹自偏好提升LLM智能体
items.title_en: Retrospective Harness Optimization: Improving LLM Agents via Self-Preference over Trajectory Rollouts
items.summary_zh: AI智能体依赖技能、工具和工作流程的“工具包”来解决复杂问题，持续改进这一工具包对于适应新任务至关重要。然而，现有优化方法通常需要真实标注的验证集，这在实际部署中难以获取。为此，研究者提出回顾性工具优化（RHO），一种仅利用过去轨迹的自监督方法。RHO通过选择多样化的核心挑战集，并基于智能体自身轨迹的偏好进行优化，无需人工标注即可提升智能体性能。该方法有望降低AI智能体在真实场景中的部署成本，推动自适应智能体的发展。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.05922v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: AI agents rely on a harness of skills, tools, and workflows to solve complex problems. Continually improving this harness is essential for adapting to new tasks. However, existing optimization methods typically require ground-truth validation sets, yet such labeled data is difficult to acquire in practical deployment settings. To address this problem, we introduce Retrospective Harness Optimization (RHO), a self-supervised method that optimizes the agent harness using only past trajectories. Specifically, RHO selects a diverse coreset of challeng…
items.why_zh: RHO解决了AI智能体在缺乏标注数据时难以持续优化的问题，为实际部署中的自适应学习提供了可行方案。
items.why_en: RHO addresses the challenge of optimizing AI agents without labeled data, enabling continuous adaptation in real-world deployments.

items.title_zh: 迈向生物医学世界模型
items.title_en: Towards World Models in Biomedical Research
items.summary_zh: 生物医学的核心目标是理解、预测并最终控制生物系统对扰动、疾病进展和治疗干预的动态机制。尽管基础模型和大语言模型加速了生物医学数据解读，但当前系统多聚焦于静态模式识别，而非前瞻性模拟生物未来。为此，研究者提出生物医学世界模型作为AI驱动发现的新范式。这类模型学习潜在表征，能够模拟生物系统的动态变化，有望推动从模式识别到因果预测的转变，加速药物发现和个性化医疗。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.05925v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: A central goal of biomedicine is to understand, predict and ultimately control the dynamic mechanisms by which biological systems respond to perturbations, disease progression and therapeutic intervention. Although foundation models and large language models have accelerated biomedical data interpretation, most current systems remain focused on static pattern recognition rather than prospective simulation of biological futures. Here we propose biomedical world models as a paradigm for AI-driven discovery. These models learn latent representations…
items.why_zh: 生物医学世界模型将AI从模式识别提升至因果模拟，有望变革药物发现和个性化医疗。
items.why_en: Biomedical world models shift AI from pattern recognition to causal simulation, potentially revolutionizing drug discovery and personalized medicine.

items.title_zh: RedditPersona：基于Reddit的社区条件化LLM适配模块化框架
items.title_en: RedditPersona: A Modular Framework for Community-Conditioned LLM Adaptation from Reddit
items.summary_zh: 社区条件化的语言模型适配需要在数据收集、社区定义和评估方面做出选择，但目前这些选择在各研究中独立进行，难以比较假设或重用成果。为此，研究者提出RedditPersona，一个标准化这些选择的模块化框架。该框架收集Reddit帖子和评论，分析活跃用户，并基于五种分组策略（子版块、图结构、语义、混合和交互）划分社区，为每种策略训练参数高效的适配器。RedditPersona提供了可复现的基准，有助于研究社区对语言模型行为的影响。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.06027v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Community-conditioned language model adaptation requires choices about data collection, community definition, and evaluation that are currently made independently in each study, making it hard to compare assumptions or reuse artifacts. We present RedditPersona, a modular framework that standardizes these choices: it collects Reddit posts and comments, profiles active users, partitions them under five grouping strategies (subreddit-based, graph-structural, semantic, hybrid, and interaction-based), trains a parameter-efficient adapter per strategy…
items.why_zh: RedditPersona为社区条件化LLM适配提供了标准化框架，便于比较不同策略并推动可复现研究。
items.why_en: RedditPersona provides a standardized framework for community-conditioned LLM adaptation, enabling reproducible research and fair comparison of strategies.

items.title_zh: 超越相似性：面向个人AI智能体的可信记忆搜索
items.title_en: Beyond Similarity: Trustworthy Memory Search for Personal AI Agents
items.summary_zh: 个人AI智能体越来越依赖长期记忆来提供跨会话的持久个性化。然而，现有记忆管道主要基于语义相似性：检索与当前查询语义相近的记忆并注入模型上下文。这造成了关键的可信度缺口，因为语义相关的记忆可能仍不适用于上下文，导致跨域泄露、谄媚、工具调用漂移或记忆诱导的越狱等威胁。本文研究记忆搜索作为可信度问题，提出超越相似性的方法，确保检索的记忆不仅相关而且安全适当。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.06054v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Personal AI agents increasingly rely on long-term memory to provide persistent personalization across sessions. However, existing memory pipelines are largely driven by semantic similarity: memory data close to the current query is retrieved and injected into the model context. This creates a critical trustworthiness gap, since a semantically related memory may still be contextually inappropriate, leading to threats such as cross-domain leakage, sycophancy, tool-call drift, or memory-induced jailbreaks.
